name: Ria Money Transfer - Novedades Y Variedades El Rey
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is a global money transfer service operating through physical agent locations offering cash pickup, bank deposits, and bill payment services across 40+ countries.
description_long: Ria Money Transfer is an established international remittance provider that facilitates cross-border money transfers through a network of physical agent locations worldwide. The company operates through partnerships with retail establishments including 7-Eleven stores, check cashing services, grocery stores, pharmacies, salons, and multiservice centers, making transfers accessible in high-traffic neighborhood locations. Ria's core offering includes multiple sending methods (online, mobile app, in-person, WhatsApp) and flexible receiving options (bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, ATM withdrawal). The company serves 40+ countries across Africa, Asia, Europe, Latin America, North America, and Oceania, positioning itself as a broad-based international remittance network. What distinguishes Ria is its hybrid agent-based model combining convenience store partnerships with independent multiservice locations, allowing customers to send and receive money through familiar neighborhood businesses rather than dedicated offices. The company provides online tracking, currency conversion tools, and IBAN calculators to support informed transfers. However, as a money transfer agent network rather than a direct financial institution, Ria's fees, exchange rates, and service availability depend entirely on the individual agent location selected. The company does not appear to offer consumer credit products, lending, or traditional banking services—its function is strictly facilitating fund movement and bill payments through agent partnerships.
address: 2456 San Bruno Ave, San Francisco, CA 94134

company_info.headquarters: 2456 San Bruno Ave, San Francisco, CA 94134

pros: Extensive agent network including 24-hour 7-Eleven locations for convenient cash access at any time
Multiple sending methods (online, app, in-person, WhatsApp) providing flexibility for different user preferences
40+ countries covered across five continents with established corridors to major remittance destinations
Diverse agent types including grocery stores, pharmacies, and multiservice centers in neighborhood locations
Multiple receiving options (cash pickup, bank deposit, digital wallet, home delivery, ATM) tailored to recipient preferences
Free online tools including currency converter and IBAN calculator for informed decision-making
Real-time transfer tracking available to monitor money in transit
cons: Agent-based model means service quality, fees, and availability vary significantly by specific location—no standardized pricing across network
Limited transparency on the website regarding fee structure, exchange rates, or comparative costs versus competitors
Dependent on agent location hours and operating status; some locations shown as closed with no guarantee of service resumption
No direct institutional support—customer issues must be resolved through individual agents rather than corporate customer service
Website provides no information about regulatory compliance, licensing, or consumer protection mechanisms
best_for: International workers and immigrants sending remittances to family in established corridors (Latin America, Philippines, Africa)
Consumers in urban areas with multiple agent locations nearby seeking convenient cash pickup without bank accounts
Customers preferring to send money in person with immediate transaction confirmation rather than online-only services
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for immigrants and international workers in urban areas who need convenient neighborhood-based cash pickup and remittance services to established corridors worldwide. The primary caveat is that as an agent network, actual service quality, fees, exchange rates, and availability depend entirely on the specific location chosen—consumers must verify terms and hours before sending funds, and corporate support for disputes may be limited.
services: Send money in person at agent locations
meta_description: Ria Money Transfer offers cash pickup, bank deposits, and bill payments across 40+ countries.
